productDisplayName: U.S.Polo Assn. Men Mud Grey Shorts
description: Style NoteIt's that time of the year when you are flooded with holidays and vacations. So hit the road, grab the wheel and enjoy the scenic beauty around you this season in style. Team these shorts from U.S Polo Assn. with sleeveless shirts and trekking boots for that absolute cool look.Product DetailsMud grey shorts, has two side pockets, two pockets on the front legs with buttoned flaps, branding appliqued on the right leg's pocket, two pockets at the back with buttoned flaps, has a comfortable wide waistband with belt loops and a button and zipper closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
